examples: More recently he has stirred controversy by partially excusing the activities of Somalia's pirates.
So, if you are excusing yourself from church attendance and even pursuing the things of God themselves, you really have no excuse.
It was that way with everything: instead of doing things for me, or excusing me, my mother insisted I find a way to do them myself.
Excusing low growth due to industry, or economic, weakness merely gives the incumbent a pass.
That's not excusing them for their actions, its just explaining the way it is.
